parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "temperature": 0.1,
  "max_tokens": 400,
  "response_format": { "type": "json_object" },
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a senior recruiter at Pearl Talent. Score candidates against the provided job description. Respond ONLY with valid JSON — no markdown, no text outside the JSON object."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Score this candidate against the Recruitment Coordinator (A320) role at Pearl Talent.

## JOB REQUIREMENTS
Must-Haves:
- 2-4+ years recruiting coordination or operations experience
- Hands-on Ashby ATS proficiency (day-one requirement)
- Strong organizational skills across multiple simultaneous open roles
- Excellent written and verbal English
- Proven urgency in fast-paced, high-growth environments
- High ownership and attention to detail

Nice-to-Haves: startup/high-growth exposure, workflow automation experience, remote/distributed team experience, async communication habits.

Key responsibilities: interview scheduling (45%), recruiting ops support (25%), process automation (20%), candidate communication (10%).

## CANDIDATE
Name: {{ $json.name }}
Location: {{ $json.location }}
Years of experience: {{ $json.years_experience }}
Psychometric score: {{ $json.psychometric_score }}/100
English proficiency score: {{ $json.english_proficiency_score }}/100
Resume summary: {{ $json.resume_summary }}

## SCORING INSTRUCTIONS
Score each dimension 0-100, then compute overall_score as weighted average:
- technical_skills x 0.35: ATS proficiency (Ashby is critical), tools used, automation capability
- experience_relevance x 0.40: recruiting coordination depth, startup/high-growth fit, role history alignment
- communication_indicators x 0.25: weight the provided english_proficiency_score at 60% and your read of the resume communication quality at 40%

Flag rules (apply to overall_score):
- Qualified: >= 70
- Needs Review: >= 45
- Unqualified: < 45

Return exactly this JSON — nothing else:
{
  "technical_skills": <0-100>,
  "experience_relevance": <0-100>,
  "communication_indicators": <0-100>,
  "overall_score": <0-100, one decimal>,
  "match_explanation": "<one sentence explaining the overall fit>",
  "flag": "Qualified|Needs Review|Unqualified"
}"
    }
  ]
}
